description:
The Nextcloud Desktop Client is a tool to synchronize files from Nextcloud Server with your computer.

Use the desktop clients to keep your files synchronized between your Nextcloud server and your desktop.
Select one or more directories on your local machine and always have access to your latest files wherever you are.
What's Changed
- [stable-3.16] fix(macOS): Fix prompting of user for permission to access "other" apps' data by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8346
- [stable-3.16] fix(msi): set the REBOOT property in the MSI by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8348
- [stable-3.16] fix(activitylistmodel): fix activities for e2ee files by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8378
- [stable-3.16] fix(accountmanager): use defaults from configFile if setting was not present by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8380
- [stable-3.16] fix(crash): debug builds would not try to remove a not found job by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8381
- [stable-3.16] fix(readonly): better handling of ACL on read-only files on windows by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8382
Full Changelog: nextcloud/desktop@v3.16.5...v3.16.6
